checks.details: Linter passed but missed let Type: any and parameter-level any declarations

checks.description: JSDoc file header on entry point
checks.details: src/index.ts has no JSDoc file header

findings.description: Dynamic import with try/catch fallback shim for @sinclair/typebox. Peer dependencies are guaranteed available at runtime. The shim exists for test isolation but creates maintenance burden and divergent behavior risk.

fix.suggestion: Import typebox directly as a peer dep. Use the real Type object. Tests run within pi which provides peer deps.

findings.description: Tool returns error message as successful content when workflow not found. LLM receives a 'success' result whose text describes an error. Tool should throw so the framework treats it as a tool failure.

fix.suggestion: Throw an error instead of returning content with error text.

findings.description: Tool catches executeWorkflow exceptions and returns error message as successful content. Masks failure from the orchestration layer.

fix.suggestion: Let the error propagate (or re-throw) so the LLM framework sees a tool failure.

findings.description: ctx.ui.select() called without ctx.hasUI guard in handleList. Interactive UI method will fail or hang in non-interactive mode.

fix.suggestion: Guard with if (!ctx.hasUI) return or throw.

findings.description: ctx.ui.input() called without ctx.hasUI guard in handleList.

fix.suggestion: Guard with if (!ctx.hasUI) return or throw.

findings.description: ctx.ui.select() called without ctx.hasUI guard in handleRun resume prompt.

fix.suggestion: Guard with if (!ctx.hasUI) return or throw.

findings.description: ctx.ui.select() called without ctx.hasUI guard in handleResume.

fix.suggestion: Guard with if (!ctx.hasUI) return or throw.

findings.description: let Type: any — typebox's Type variable declared as any, disabling all type checking on tool parameter definitions.

fix.suggestion: Import Type from @sinclair/typebox directly. Resolves with p2-typebox-shim fix.

findings.description: ctx: any, pi: any, params: any, onUpdate: any used as parameter types across handleList, handleRun, handleResume, and the extension factory. Loses type checking on the pi extension API surface.

fix.suggestion: Define structural interfaces for ExtensionContext and PiApi, or import from pi's type exports.

findings.description: onUpdate parameter declared but never used in execute body. Convention requires _ prefix on unused parameters.

formatToolResult concatenates all step names. formatResult output injected via pi.sendMessage for completion. For large workflows, this content could be substantial. Dispatch MAX_STDOUT_BYTES guard exists but completion message is not truncated.

fix.suggestion: Add length limit on completion message content.

findings.description: src/index.ts has no JSDoc file header. All other source files have descriptive headers.
